title: P4 PenPens Potential Purpose
wikitext:
[]: P^4 (PenPen's Potential Purpose)             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jan 25, 2008 8:27 pm I noticed this a while back, but I just now confirmed it while watching 1.0 with subtitles. Misato now mentions that she first got PenPen fifteen years ago. Now: -We all know that's when 2I happened. -2I happened in Antarctica. -Penguins live in Antarctica. I reckon PenPen will have a bigger role this time around. Anno was recalcitrant to add him in the first place, so I think he has a more central role planned for Rebuild .

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jan 25, 2008 8:37 pm quit it NOW I don't want another "Pen^2(^4 wtf?) is GOD" thread

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jan 25, 2008 8:47 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: quit it NOW I don't want another "Pen^2(^4 wtf?) is GOD" thread

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Jan 25, 2008 8:51 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: I don't want another "Pen^2(^4 wtf?) is GOD" thread

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jan 26, 2008 12:48 am I was SO against PenPen being in the REBUILD movies because I always felt he was more distracting to the series mature tone than anything else (I still really dislike his reaction shots in EOE thinking its the only real flaw in the movie).... but then I saw him reading a newspaper and my heart just melted. Damn you Anno. Damn you straight to hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 26, 2008 12:52 am What is it gonna turn out that Pen^2 is Adam? Or that crap that Pen^2 is actually Misato's dad. Or is it just completely irrelevant?

[]:             Quote Post by kasuturo » Sat Jan 26, 2008 8:42 am Why am I having a Sabrina, The Teenage Witch flashback while reading this? :S

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jan 26, 2008 8:44 am Most Penguins don't live in Antartica. Only 4 of the 17 different species do. And Pen^2 isn't one of them, he's a new breed called a warm springs penguin. While he might like cooler temps from time to time his name implies that he would not be comfortable in an artic environment. Your fanwank is debunked. But Pen^2 is god and he likes to watch the girls take baths.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Jan 26, 2008 9:57 am Penpen is most likely there for the younger audiences, whereas we have the Shinji groaping Rei in her appartment scene to fap over, they get to giggle at a weird penguin.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jan 26, 2008 10:28 am Sadamoto's backstory had him being in a genetics lab where Misato worked prior to joining Nerv, and she got to like him so much she saved him from being eusthanized and took him to live with her. Indeed, he'd never be able to live in Antarctica the way it was pre-2I. Pen-Pen reading the newspaper was every little bit as memorable as seeing Ramiel in all his deadly glory.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jan 26, 2008 12:25 pm Hunter21 wrote: While he might like cooler temps from time to time his name implies that he would not be comfortable in an artic environment. Your fanwank is debunked.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 26, 2008 7:13 pm Hunter21 wrote: But Pen^2 is god and he likes to watch the girls take baths.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 28, 2008 5:44 am Pen-Pen read a newspaper in the original show, you know.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jan 28, 2008 7:03 am He didn't lean back, stretch his arms out and waggle his foot while reading the paper in the old show, did he? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Jul 21, 2008 8:28 pm I always saw Pen^2 as comic relief. And for that, I love him. He helps the audience avoid becoming subdued by suicidal thoughts and crazy acid mind fraks. also... If there were actually real life warm springs penguins, I would totally buy one, no matter the cost!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 21, 2008 9:00 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Or that crap that Pen^2 is actually Misato's dad.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Jul 22, 2008 5:24 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: I was SO against PenPen being in the REBUILD movies because I always felt he was more distracting to the series mature tone than anything else (I still really dislike his reaction shots in EOE thinking its the only real flaw in the movie)....

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Jul 22, 2008 5:24 am UrsusArctos wrote: Sadamoto's backstory had him being in a genetics lab where Misato worked prior to joining Nerv, and she got to like him so much she saved him from being eusthanized and took him to live with her. Indeed, he'd never be able to live in Antarctica the way it was pre-2I.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue Jul 22, 2008 1:47 pm Pen-Pen is in attempt at transplanting a human brain into a penguins body to see if the identity of the individual is tied to the mind, or to the body. It's the only explanation really... when you think about it. Like the Goldfish, Klaus

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Jul 22, 2008 2:38 pm JimmyWolk wrote: Manga backstory contradicts the 15 years thing though. Maybe he had some therapeutic use during her silent time - if she ever has that in Rebuild.
